site.title: Kĩama Kĩrĩa Gĩtongoragia Maũndũ ma Gũthiĩ na Mbere Thĩinĩ wa Thĩ
site.tagline: Kuuma ũbataro-inĩ wa ũkinyanĩri nginya kũrĩ repo cia mũingĩ
nav.label: Kĩambĩrĩria
skip.toContent: Thiĩ na mbere na ũhoro ũrĩa ũrĩ thĩinĩ
meta.home.description: IATF ĩgarũraga mabataro ma kũhingũrwo na njĩra ya gwĩkĩra ũhoro wa ũhingũru thĩinĩ wa icunjĩ cia ũhoro ũtarĩ mũhuko.
meta.projects.description: Thuthuria mĩbango ĩrĩa ĩheanĩtwo nĩ IATF ya gũteithĩrĩria andũ.
meta.propose.description: Hoya IATF ĩgũteithie gũtaũkĩrũo nĩ ũhoro ũcio kũgerera intaneti, kũhũthĩra e-mail, kana kũhũthĩra Discord.
meta.governance.description: Thoma wone ũrĩa rũhonge rwa IATF rwamũkagĩra mĩbango, rũtongoragia ũhoro, na rũgatigĩrĩra atĩ wĩra nĩ wa andũ othe.
meta.join.description: Njĩra cia kũnyitanĩra na IATF: gũteithĩrĩria kwandĩka, gũtaũra, gũthima, kana gũtũũria mũbango.
meta.accessibility.description: Ũrĩa IATF ĩkoragwo na muoroto wa gũtigĩrĩra atĩ website ĩno no ĩkinyanĩre na ũrĩa mũndũ angĩkinyĩrĩka.
meta.transparency.description: Rekondi cia mũingĩ cia IATF: matua, mĩbango, na ũhoro mwerũ ũikaraga ũhingũrĩtwo.
actions.emailProjects: Twandĩkĩre marũa ma kwĩrutĩra thĩinĩ wa ithandũkũ rĩa marũa
registry.empty.title: Gũtirĩ mĩbango ĩkoretwo ĩgĩcabwo
registry.empty.body: IATF nĩ ĩraharĩria mũbango wayo wa mbere.
proposal.form.title: Tũmĩra marũa ma kũũria
proposal.form.body: Ũiyũrie fomu ĩno ĩrĩ haha mũhuro nĩguo ũtũme marũa ma kũhoya ũteithio kũrĩ rũhonge rwa IATF.
proposal.form.noscript: JavaScript nĩ ĩbataranagia kũhũthĩra fomu ĩno ya web. Angĩkorũo ndĩrĩ ho, no ũhũthagĩre e-mail kana Discord handũ ha ĩyo.
proposal.form.runtimeUnavailable: Kũrutithania ndũmĩrĩri ĩmwe kwa ĩmwe gũtihaarĩirio gĩikaro-inĩ gĩkĩ. Gĩikaro gĩkĩ nĩ gĩkaahingũra thimũ yaku handũ ha ũguo.
proposal.form.loadingProtection: Kũhaarĩria kũruta ũhoro na njĩra ya ũgitĩri...
proposal.form.ready: Rĩrĩa watũma ihoya rĩu, IATF nĩ ĩgaathondeka rekondi ya kũingĩra.
proposal.form.turnstileRequired: Hihinya ũhingũre ũhoro wa kũgitĩra spam mbere ya gũtũma.
proposal.form.turnstileExpired: Ũgitĩri wa Spam nĩ ũhĩtũkĩte. Rora rĩngĩ mbere ya gũtũma.
proposal.form.turnstileError: Kũgitĩra Spam gũtiahotire gwĩkwo ihinda-inĩ rĩrĩ. Ũkĩra ũgerie rĩngĩ.
proposal.form.turnstileTimeout: Ũgitĩri wa Spam nĩ ũhĩtũkire. Geria rĩngĩ.
proposal.form.requiredMessage: Nĩ wega ũiyũrie ũhoro ũrĩa ũbataranagia mbere ya gũtũma.
proposal.form.successFollowUp: Ũngĩaria na IATF rĩngĩ ũhoro-inĩ wĩgiĩ ihoya rĩrĩ, nyita ũhoro ũyũ ũrĩ haha mũhuro.
proposal.form.errorGeneric: Harĩ ũndũ wahĩtũkire rĩrĩa ũratũma kĩũria kĩu. Ũkĩra ũgerie rĩngĩ. Ũngĩthiĩ na mbere na thĩna, hũthĩra e-mail handũ ha ũguo.
project.detail.problemTitle: Nĩ thĩna ũrĩkũ ũninagwo nĩ mũbango ũyũ?
project.detail.whyTitle: Gĩtũmi gĩa gũteithĩrĩrio nĩ mũbango ũyũ
project.detail.field.languageNotes: Maũndũ Marĩa Marĩ Thĩinĩ wa Thiomi
project.detail.defaultLanguageNotes: Rũthiomi rwa Gĩthũngũ no rwĩyongerereke thutha-inĩ
footer.label: Gĩcunjĩ gĩa magũrũ kĩa website
footer.licenseContent: Maũndũ marĩa marĩ ho CC BY-SA 4.0
footer.blurb: Wĩra wa gũteithĩrĩria andũ gũtaũkĩrũo nĩ mohoro wagĩrĩirũo gũkorũo ũrĩ mũhũthũ kwambĩrĩria, gũcabwo, na kũhingũrio.
footer.source: Ũhoro wĩgiĩ ithimi cia ũkinyanĩru: [W3C WAI](https://www.w3.org/WAI/)Kũmenyeria arĩa mahũthagĩra tekinolonjĩ cia gũteithĩrĩria.
contact.label: Ũhoro wa Kwaranĩria
project.status.archived: Maũndũ Marĩa Marĩ Thĩinĩ wa Gũtũũrithia
translation.label: Ũhoro wa Ũtaũri
translation.source: Rũthiomi rwa Gĩthũngũ nĩruo rũthiomi rũrĩa rũhũthagĩrũo mũno gĩcunjĩ-inĩ gĩkĩ.
translation.humanReviewed: Bibilia ĩyo nĩ yagarũririo nĩ mwaria mũũgĩ.
translation.machineAssisted: Ũtaũri ũyũ nĩ wa gũteithĩrĩrio nĩ macini na ndwarĩ ũcoke wĩkwo ũthuthuria nĩ mũndũ ũmenyaga rũthiomi wega.
translation.needsUpdate: Bibilia ĩno nĩ yagarũrirũo mbere ya gũtaũrũo na rũthiomi rwa Gĩthũngũ na no ĩbatare gũcenjio.
translation.report: Riboti ya thĩna wa ũtaũri: {{contact.i18nEmail}}Nĩ wega mũno.
